creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Having attached a high-end keyboard USB-attached 'DAS keyboard' to my private FreeBSD box. Since then, the kernel drops error messages:

ukbd_set_leds_callback:700: error=USB_ERR_STALLED

I'm able to disable these messages via
sysctl hw.usb.ukbd.no_leds=0

but then I can't see anymore wheter CAPSLOCK or NUMLOCK are enabled or not.

Appended is the dmesg output. I realised that the USB controller seems to be unrecognised (MoBo is an oldish ASUS A8N32-SLI, based on nVidia CK804/X16 nForce4X16).
